judge_result.notes: Artefact demonstrates a complete GA4 setup audit with snapshot, prioritised fixes, MCP-vs-manual delineation, smoke-test event counts, and clear next-step skill handoffs. Australian English conventions are followed and no required configuration keys are left blank.
